response.justification: Wei Chen demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and experience with distributed systems, but lacks the required depth in C++ and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. The resume highlights leadership in mentoring and tooling, but the technical leadership role in cloud compute is not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Diverse experience with distributed systems and infrastructure (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media).
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and technical best practices (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium Course).
Strong problem-solving skills and adaptability across languages and domains (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, real-time data processing).
concerns: Lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience (only noted in 1 role at National Instruments).
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or production-level cloud architecture.
Technical leadership roles are not explicitly tied to cloud or DevOps engineering teams.
